name: Cloud Security Engineer
title: Cloud Security Engineer and Technical Writer
bio:
I am a seasoned Cloud Security Engineer with over a decade of experience designing, deploying, and securing enterprise cloud infrastructure across Azure, AWS, and GCP. My expertise lies in Zero Trust architecture, DevSecOps automation, and incident response. I hold numerous industry certifications and am passionate about sharing practical, hands-on knowledge with the cybersecurity community.

Throughout my career, I've successfully defended critical systems against advanced persistent threats and built resilient security operations centers from the ground up. I believe that security should enable business, not hinder it, and I write to bridge the gap between complex technical concepts and executable strategies.
